description: Tests whether QC sub-agents return a VERDICT line when invoked. The 'skill' is the scope constraint appended to the end of QC prompts: 'Do NOT invoke any skills (including iterative-improvement)... Return the PASS/FAIL verdict as your final message and stop.' Without the constraint, agents may trigger global iterative-improvement and return a folder-tidy report instead of a verdict.

evals.prompt: QC1A sub-agent invocation: verify 3 sampled PLAYER initiatives against live Jira and return a PASS/FAIL verdict.
evals.expected_output: A response containing a line 'VERDICT: PASS' or 'VERDICT: FAIL' as one of the first substantive outputs.
expectations: The response contains a line starting with 'VERDICT: PASS' or 'VERDICT: FAIL'
The VERDICT line appears before any folder-tidy or iterative-improvement content

evals.prompt: QC3 sub-agent invocation: verify the Manage tribe spreadsheet sort order and row count, return PASS/FAIL verdict.
evals.expected_output: A response containing a line 'VERDICT: PASS' or 'VERDICT: FAIL'.
expectations: The response contains a line starting with 'VERDICT: PASS' or 'VERDICT: FAIL'
The VERDICT line appears before any folder-tidy or iterative-improvement content

evals.prompt: QC4 sub-agent invocation: verify Master spreadsheet Overview tab tribe totals match tribe-level spreadsheets, return PASS/FAIL verdict.
evals.expected_output: A response containing a line 'VERDICT: PASS' or 'VERDICT: FAIL'.
expectations: The response contains a line starting with 'VERDICT: PASS' or 'VERDICT: FAIL'
The VERDICT line appears before any folder-tidy or iterative-improvement content
